title: ÖIF B1 Exam Prep Books
description: Exam-focused speaking and writing prep books for the ÖIF B1 integration exam

speaking.title: ÖIF B1 Speaking Exam Prep
speaking.subtitle: Real dialogues, examiner questions, and vocabulary
speaking.description: Real dialogues, examiner questions, and vocabulary for the ÖIF B1 speaking exam.
speaking.summary: 30 planning dialogues, 30 discussion topics, picture-description practice, vocabulary support, and examiner follow-up questions.

writing.title: ÖIF B1 Schreiben – Übungsbuch
writing.subtitle: Vorbereitung auf die ÖIF B1 Integrationsprüfung
writing.description: Thirty writing units, practical phrase support, checklists, and mock tasks for the ÖIF B1 writing exam.

sample.title: Free sample with 4 writing tasks
sample.description: Four sample writing tasks that show the structure, tone, and support used in the full workbook.

freeSample.text: See how the writing workbook teaches structure, register, and practical exam-ready phrasing.
freeSample.label: Get Writing Sample

fullBook.title: Need full ÖIF B1 writing practice?

gumroad._note: Legacy speaking-book aliases kept for existing page content that still reads site.gumroad.* directly.

ga4._setup_instructions: Create GA4 property at analytics.google.com, get real Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX format), replace empty string above, then set enabled: true
